item.name: Illuminati Gobdip
item.description: An alchemical potion concocted in the dark laboratoriums of the Illuminati. Some of the realm's more daring blacksmiths have applied the unnaturally viscous substance to a variety of weapons and found that it heightens the attributes of certain ancient martial artifacts. However, advances in crafting technology have rendered it obsolete.

obj.n: Alexander - The Burden of the Father (Savage)
